word: G385 - ἀνασπάω - anaspáō - an-as-pah'-o - Draw up

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνασπάω

- Transliteration: Anaspao

- Phonetic: an-as-pah'-o

- Definition:

1. to draw up

- Origin: from G303 and G4685

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 and G4685; to take up or extricate: - draw up pull out.
